name: Home desk and object-centric navigation
description: After the IA overhaul, the app opens on Home with the four object tabs (Home, Campaigns, Brand, Team), a live-model badge, and a working desk.

planSteps.description: Verify the app lands on the Home view without errors or a blank screen.
Verify the navigation shows exactly these views: Home, Campaigns, Brand, Team.
Verify a 'live on' model badge is visible in the top bar (for example 'live on mock (offline demo)' or a real model name).
Click each navigation item in turn: Campaigns, Brand, Team, then back to Home.
Verify each view renders content without a console-visible crash, blank screen, or stuck loading state.
